diagrams.title: Electromagnetic Spectrum for Wireless Communication
diagrams.description: Shows the complete electromagnetic spectrum with emphasis on radio waves, microwaves, and infrared regions used in communication
elements: Common applications (FM, TV, Mobile, WiFi, Bluetooth)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding frequency allocation and typical applications for each band

diagrams.title: Radio Wave Propagation Methods
diagrams.description: Three types of radio wave propagation: ground wave, sky wave, and line-of-sight
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how radio waves travel from transmitter to receiver in different frequency ranges

diagrams.title: Satellite Communication System
diagrams.description: Block diagram showing satellite communication links and orbit types
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how satellite communication works and different orbital positions

diagrams.title: Wi-Fi and Bluetooth Standards Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison table showing different wireless standards with their specifications
diagrams.purpose: Comparing wireless local area network and personal area network standards
